prose:
**Water frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitting via RIJK) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single-point on user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz` (no geometry optimization). SCF converged in 7 cycles; no warnings reported.  
Frontier orbital energies:  
• HOMO = –8.6037183 eV  
• LUMO = +0.33695037 eV  
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = 8.9406687 eV  

Reproducibility:  
Command:  
```  
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier   
  --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1   
  --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard   
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz   
  --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpcpq198_n/live.json  
```  
Result JSON: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpcpq198_n/live.json`  
Log (stdout/stderr): streaming live to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpcpq198_n/frontier_*.out` (you can `tail -f` this file).  
Integrity check: trustworthy.
